title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: The video demonstrates five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails implemented in code rather than prompts, and runtime steering for self-correction. Each technique is shown with before-and-after demos using a travel agent built with Strands Agents framework.
